back_translation: A song. A psalm of the sons of Korah.
Great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised, in the city of our God, on His holy mountain.
Beautiful in its loftiness, the joy of all the earth, like the heights of the north is Mount Zion, the city of the great King.
God is in her citadels; He has shown Himself to be a fortress.
For behold, the kings assembled; they advanced together.
They saw, and they were astounded; they were terrified and fled.
Trembling seized them there, anguish like a woman in labor.
With the east wind You wrecked the ships of Tarshish.
As we have heard, so we have seen, in the city of the LORD of Hosts, in the city of our God; God will establish her forever. Selah
O God, we contemplate Your steadfast love within Your temple.
As Your name, O God, so is Your praise to the ends of the earth; Your right hand is full of righteousness.
Mount Zion is glad, and the daughters of Judah rejoice, because of Your judgments.
March around Zion, go around her, count her towers.
Consider her ramparts, examine her citadels, that you may tell the next generation.
For this God is our God forever and ever; He will be our guide even unto death.
